title: Energy Optimization
text:
APIs & Documentation
Energy Optimization
Energy Optimization
Tools and models to optimize renewable energy, conventional generation, and energy storage systems for buildings, campuses, communities, and microgrids.
REopt™ API
The REopt™ Application Programming Interface provides programmatic access to NLR's REopt tool. REopt is a techno-economic decision support platform is used by NLR researchers to optimize energy systems for buildings, campuses, communities, microgrids, and more. REopt recommends the optimal mix of renewable energy, conventional generation, and energy storage technologies to meet cost savings, resilience, and energy performance goals.
